introSection: Jupiter (Japanese: ジュピター) is an Intamin wooden roller coaster located at Kijima Kogen in Beppu, Ōita Prefecture, Japan. Opened in 1992, Jupiter was the first wooden roller coaster in Japan and the only wooden roller coaster in Japan until White Canyon at Yomiuriland and White Cyclone at Nagashima Spa Land opened in 1994. At over in length, Jupiter is the 7th longest wooden roller coaster in the world.
fullText:
Jupiter (Japanese: ジュピター) is an Intamin wooden roller coaster located at Kijima Kogen in Beppu, Ōita Prefecture, Japan. Opened in 1992, Jupiter was the first wooden roller coaster in Japan and the only wooden roller coaster in Japan until White Canyon at Yomiuriland and White Cyclone at Nagashima Spa Land opened in 1994. At over in length, Jupiter is the 7th longest wooden roller coaster in the world.






 * Jupiter on the parks website
